TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Jianshi Itini i Hsinchu ko Jianshi Siyang. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 522.98 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 397.38 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 114.53 km²), 9,456 ko tamdaw i Jianshi Siyang, 2,825 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 8,569 a tamdaw, pakaala to 91%(Tayal泰雅族) no polong no tamdaw. o Tayal ko sa'alomanay i Hsinchu. O kasaniyarona 7 ko cun, 49 ko niyaro' i Jianshi Siyang. Mkzihing , Mkmatuy , Piling , Paqiy , Yutak , Kbaqeh , Cinbulan , Kuxan , Ageq , Micista , Mknahuy , Mksuzing , Mklapay , Lkuxan , Hbun-Rangay , Mkslaq , Qalang-Qwayux , Hbun-Qramay , Pololan , Uraw , Libu , Llyung , Ulay , Batul , Ｍami , Quri , Plmwan , Tayax , Ponaway , Smangus , Thyakan , Smangus , Cinsbu , Yuluw , Gowryu , Rahaw , Cyocuy , Hbun kramay , Hbun-tunan , Kin lwan , Qolu , Qyuws , Hbun-lesa , Metapay , M'yutak , Mrmurak , Spwan , Melukux , Metuiy .
S.PHON: *iansħi itini i ħsinʦħo~u~u ko~u *iansħi sijaŋ. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u ***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u ***.** km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u ***.** km*), *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i *iansħi sijaŋ, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u *,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(tajaɾ***) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u tajaɾ ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i ħsinʦħo~u~u. o~u kasanijaro~una * ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i *iansħi sijaŋ. mk*iħiŋ , mkmato~u~uj , piɾiŋ , pa*ij , jo~u~utak , kb~b~va*əħ , ʦinb~b~vo~u~uɾan , ko~u~uxan , a*ə* , miʦista , mknaħo~u~uj , mkso~u~u*iŋ , mkɾapaj , ɾko~u~uxan , ħb~b~vo~u~un-raŋaj , mksɾa* , *aɾaŋ-*wajo~u~ux , ħb~b~vo~u~un-*ramaj , po~uɾo~uɾan , o~u~uraw , ɾib~b~vo~u~u , ɾɾjo~u~uŋ , o~u~uɾaj , b~b~vato~u~uɾ , *ami , *o~u~uri , pɾmwan , tajax , po~unawaj , smaŋo~u~us , tħjakan , smaŋo~u~us , ʦinsb~b~vo~u~u , jo~u~uɾo~u~uw , *o~uwrjo~u~u , raħaw , ʦjo~uʦo~u~uj , ħb~b~vo~u~un kramaj , ħb~b~vo~u~un-to~u~unan , kin ɾwan , *o~uɾo~u~u , *jo~u~uws , ħb~b~vo~u~un-ɾəsa , mətapaj , mʡjo~u~utak , mrmo~u~urak , spwan , məɾo~u~uko~u~ux , məto~u~uij .
S.FORM: Jianshi Itini i Hsinchu ko Jianshi Siyang. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 522.98 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 397.38 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 114.53 km²), 9,456 ko tamdaw i Jianshi Siyang, 2,825 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 8,569 a tamdaw, pakaala to 91%(Tayal泰雅族) no polong no tamdaw. o Tayal ko sa'alomanay i Hsinchu. O kasaniyarona 7 ko cun, 49 ko niyaro' i Jianshi Siyang. Mkzihing , Mkmatuy , Piling , Paqiy , Yutak , Kbaqeh , Cinbulan , Kuxan , Ageq , Micista , Mknahuy , Mksuzing , Mklapay , Lkuxan , Hbun-Rangay , Mkslaq , Qalang-Qwayux , Hbun-Qramay , Pololan , Uraw , Libu , Llyung , Ulay , Batul , Ｍami , Quri , Plmwan , Tayax , Ponaway , Smangus , Thyakan , Smangus , Cinsbu , Yuluw , Gowryu , Rahaw , Cyocuy , Hbun kramay , Hbun-tunan , Kin lwan , Qolu , Qyuws , Hbun-lesa , Metapay , M'yutak , Mrmurak , Spwan , Melukux , Metuiy .
S.PHON: *iansħi itini i ħsinʦħo~u~u ko~u *iansħi sijaŋ. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u ***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u ***.** km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u ***.** km*), *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i *iansħi sijaŋ, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u *,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(tajaɾ***) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u tajaɾ ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i ħsinʦħo~u~u. o~u kasanijaro~una * ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i *iansħi sijaŋ. mk*iħiŋ , mkmato~u~uj , piɾiŋ , pa*ij , jo~u~utak , kb~b~va*əħ , ʦinb~b~vo~u~uɾan , ko~u~uxan , a*ə* , miʦista , mknaħo~u~uj , mkso~u~u*iŋ , mkɾapaj , ɾko~u~uxan , ħb~b~vo~u~un-raŋaj , mksɾa* , *aɾaŋ-*wajo~u~ux , ħb~b~vo~u~un-*ramaj , po~uɾo~uɾan , o~u~uraw , ɾib~b~vo~u~u , ɾɾjo~u~uŋ , o~u~uɾaj , b~b~vato~u~uɾ , *ami , *o~u~uri , pɾmwan , tajax , po~unawaj , smaŋo~u~us , tħjakan , smaŋo~u~us , ʦinsb~b~vo~u~u , jo~u~uɾo~u~uw , *o~uwrjo~u~u , raħaw , ʦjo~uʦo~u~uj , ħb~b~vo~u~un kramaj , ħb~b~vo~u~un-to~u~unan , kin ɾwan , *o~uɾo~u~u , *jo~u~uws , ħb~b~vo~u~un-ɾəsa , mətapaj , mʡjo~u~utak , mrmo~u~urak , spwan , məɾo~u~uko~u~ux , məto~u~uij .
